footerDescription: Research Made Easy (RME) is a dedicated, end-to-end platform built to simplify and streamline the entire process of scientific research in India. Our foundational mission is to radically remove the unnecessary burdens from bureaucratic supply chain delays and characterization booking fragmentation to critical infrastructure gaps thereby liberating researchers to focus their valuable time, intellectual energy, and talent entirely on productive, high-quality scientific inquiry and discovery.
visionStatement: Our ultimate and long-term vision is to transcend our role as an ecosystem enabler and evolve RME into one of the Top Research Facilities in the World, driving global-standard innovation directly from India.
surveyDescription: This survey collects data on researcher experiences and the availability of research resources. Your feedback helps us improve the research ecosystem.
heroDescription: A high-performance comparison platform for objective research data collection. help us refine insights by evaluating resource availability and research experiences.
